name: Sanyou Corporation Limited
summary: Sanyou Corporation Limited engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of relays in China. It produces various types of relays, such as magnetic latching relays, general power relays, automotive relays, and communication relays that are used in home appliances, traffic, industry, energy, information, medical treatment, and other fields. The company was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Dongguan, China.
